message:
Add E2E test infrastructure with Playwright

Initial Playwright setup for end-to-end testing:
- playwright.config.ts with web app configuration
- e2e/web/ directory for web app tests
- Package.json script for running tests

Test infrastructure targets the Next.js web app
running on localhost for comprehensive user journey testing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,72 @@
+import { defineConfig, devices } from "@playwright/test";
+
+/**
+ * Playwright configuration for JeffreysPrompts web e2e tests
+ * @see https://playwright.dev/docs/test-configuration
+ */
+export default defineConfig({
+  testDir: "./web",
+  /* Run tests in files in parallel */
+  fullyParallel: true,
+  /* Fail the build on CI if you accidentally left test.only in the source code. */
+  forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI,
+  /* Retry on CI only */
+  retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0,
+  /* Opt out of parallel tests on CI. */
+  workers: process.env.CI ? 1 : undefined,
+  /* Reporter to use. See https://playwright.dev/docs/test-reporters */
+  reporter: [
+    ["html", { open: "never" }],
+    ["list"],
+  ],
+  /* Shared settings for all the projects below. See https://playwright.dev/docs/api/class-testoptions. */
+  use: {
+    /* Base URL to use in actions like `await page.goto('/')`. */
+    baseURL: process.env.E2E_BASE_URL || "http://localhost:3001",
+
+    /* Collect trace when retrying the failed test. See https://playwright.dev/docs/trace-viewer */
+    trace: "on-first-retry",
+
+    /* Take screenshot on failure */
+    screenshot: "only-on-failure",
+
+    /* Record video on failure */
+    video: "on-first-retry",
+  },
+
+  /* Configure projects for major browsers */
+  projects: [
+    {
+      name: "chromium",
+      use: { ...devices["Desktop Chrome"] },
+    },
+
+    {
+      name: "firefox",
+      use: { ...devices["Desktop Firefox"] },
+    },
+
+    {
+      name: "webkit",
+      use: { ...devices["Desktop Safari"] },
+    },
+
+    /* Test against mobile viewports. */
+    {
+      name: "Mobile Chrome",
+      use: { ...devices["Pixel 5"] },
+    },
+    {
+      name: "Mobile Safari",
+      use: { ...devices["iPhone 12"] },
+    },
+  ],
+
+  /* Run your local dev server before starting the tests */
+  webServer: {
+    command: "cd ../apps/web && bun run dev --port 3001",
+    url: "http://localhost:3001",
+    reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,
+    timeout: 120 * 1000, // 2 minutes for Next.js startup
+  },
+});

@@ -15,13 +15,17 @@
     "lint": "bun run --cwd apps/web lint",
     "test": "bun run --cwd apps/web test",
     "test:cli": "bun test jfp.test.ts",

+    "test:e2e:web": "bunx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts",
+    "test:e2e:web:ui": "bunx playwright test --config e2e/playwright.config.ts --ui",
     "jfp": "bun run jfp.ts",
     "build:cli": "./scripts/build-cli.sh",
     "build:releases": "./scripts/build-releases.sh",
     "build:data": "bun run scripts/build-data.ts",
     "validate": "bun run scripts/validate-prompts.ts"
   },
   "devDependencies": {
+    "@playwright/test": "^1.57.0",
     "typescript": "^5.7.0"
   },
